description: Production tool/DAW artifact signatures. Used to identify production environment from audio characteristics.

pro_tools.name: Pro Tools
audio_artifacts: precise sample-accurate editing boundary clicks (if uncorrected)
gain staging typical of high-headroom 32-bit float processing
Avid hardware console emulation signatures in older sessions
pro_tools.context_notes: Industry standard in professional studios. Pro Tools presence indicates professional studio context.

logic_pro.name: Logic Pro
audio_artifacts: Vintage analog plugin emulations (VCA compressor, tape delay) with specific harmonic signatures
Drummer virtual instrument's characteristic groove patterns
Space Designer reverb's specific impulse response character
logic_pro.context_notes: macOS-exclusive, common in independent and bedroom production since the price drop to £199.99.

ableton_live.name: Ableton Live
audio_artifacts: Warp engine stretching artifacts at non-original tempos
Complex granular artefacts when extreme warping applied
Session view clip launching transient artifacts
Drum Rack's distinct workflow-based groove patterns
ableton_live.context_notes: Dominant in electronic music production and live performance contexts. The Warp engine's timestretching is identifiable at extreme ratios.
confidence_indicators: warped tempo artifacts on sustained elements

fl_studio.name: FL Studio
audio_artifacts: Sytrus and Harmor synthesiser characteristic timbres
FL-specific mixer channel strip processing signatures
fl_studio.context_notes: Heavily used in hip-hop, trap, and EDM production globally. The step sequencer workflow leaves specific rhythmic pattern signatures.

garageband.name: GarageBand
audio_artifacts: Software instruments with distinctive timbral signatures
Lower dynamic range processing typical of default settings
garageband.context_notes: Entry-level production tool. Presence may indicate amateur or bedroom production context.

ssl_4000_console.name: SSL 4000 Console
ssl_4000_console.signature: G-Bus compressor 'glue' — specific attack/release characteristics that increase transient coherence across the mix
ssl_4000_console.psychosomatic_note: The SSL G-Bus became a prestige signal itself — its presence implies major label budget in the era before software emulations made it accessible.
ssl_4000_console.frequency_signature: gentle high-shelf boost above 8kHz, controlled sub-bass buildup

neve_1073.name: Neve 1073 Preamp/EQ
neve_1073.signature: Transformer-based harmonic saturation, gentle 12kHz air band, characteristic warmth below 300Hz
neve_1073.psychosomatic_note: The Neve sound is warm and present — associated with authenticity and professional recording. Its presence is both an authenticity marker and a prestige signal depending on context.

urei_1176.name: UREI 1176 Compressor
urei_1176.signature: FET compression with very fast attack (20-800μs), characteristic 'all-buttons-in' mode saturation
urei_1176.psychosomatic_note: Fast FET compression adds presence and excitement. In all-buttons-in mode creates aggressive distortion — associated with rock and R&B energy.

de_la_soul_production.name: Sample-Based Hip-Hop Production (Pre-Clearance Era)
de_la_soul_production.signature: Recognisable sample slices with original recording characteristics intact, vinyl crackle, original room ambience preserved
de_la_soul_production.psychosomatic_note: Pre-clearance era sampling carried the acoustic DNA of the original recording into the new work. The original musicians' presence — their room, their bodies, their era — arrived in the new piece uninvited and honestly.

loudness_war_mastering.name: Loudness War Mastering

signature.limiting_artifacts: transients squared off, sustained elements appear louder than peaks

loudness_war_mastering.psychosomatic_note: The most clearly documented manufacturing signature in modern music. Crest factor below 6dB creates perceptual fatigue — the body's dynamic response system has nothing to respond to. Associated with commercial pressure over listener wellbeing.

auto_tune_pitched.name: Auto-Tune / Pitch Correction

signature.retune_artifact: visible pitch 'jumps' between notes — Cher Effect extreme version
signature.vibrato_character: uniform, perfect rate vs natural irregular vibrato

auto_tune_pitched.psychosomatic_note: Heavy pitch correction removes the vocal signature of real-time performance. The body loses the micro-intonation variance that signals another living body's presence. Light correction is invisible; heavy correction is audible as absence.

lo_fi_aesthetic.name: Lo-Fi Aesthetic Processing

signature.noise_floor: deliberate vinyl crackle or tape noise added

lo_fi_aesthetic.psychosomatic_note: Lo-fi aesthetics are a reaction to loudness war overproduction — the noise floor, warmth, and imperfection are used as authenticity signals. But they are manufactured authenticity. The question is whether the underlying creative signal is genuine.
